TimeEntry.Title: CLBLenova : Failed patch found, manually udpate
TimeEntry.Notes:
CLBLenova:
I accessed the machine and downloaded and successfully applied the following patches:

  • 408c162b-fd3d-42e0-b89d-64357487a90c_0110812791a66ac77ad2fb8adc336c7cb6885300.cab

  • ZoomInstallerFull_6.7.2.26346_64.exe

  • windows11.0-kb5074828-x64-ndp481-25H2_win11.msu

  • windows11.0-kb5074105-x64-25H2_win11.msu

  • Office365_installer_19628.20166B_currentx64.exe

 I then rescanned the patches in the MyRMM portal and confirmed that the database was updated successfully with the applied patches.

After deployment, I cleaned the Downloads folder.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote
